bloggers.name: Malta InsideOut — Retire to Malta: Expat Insights
bloggers.description: Long-running Malta lifestyle/expat blog with retirement-specific insights. Gozo is the quieter option vs busy main island.

bloggers.name: International Living — Retire to Malta
bloggers.description: IL Malta hub. Gozo (capital Victoria) increasingly viewed as one of Malta's best places to live. Cheaper than Sliema/St Julian's.
